title: gleichenia circinnata var. rupestris
intro: Gleichenia circinnata var. rupestris is a variety of the Gleichenia circinnata fern, also known as the rock fern, which is a type of epiphytic or terrestrial fern species native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, and it is believed to possess antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Gleichenia circinnata var. rupestris are said to offer health benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial protection, which can be beneficial for skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal remedy.
